commit_message:
Master Master <!-- CURSOR_SUMMARY -->
> [!NOTE]
> Adds Xilinx IP configuration/stub files, IO constraints, and multiple simulation testbenches and mocks.
> 
> - **FPGA project assets**:
>   - **IP cores**:
>     - Add configs (`.xci`, `.xml`) for `blk_mem_gen_{0,1,2}`, `clk_wiz_0`, `ip_pll`, `ip_rgb2dvi`, and `mig_7series_0` under `project-template-xilinx.srcs/sources_1/ip/`.
>     - Add Verilog stubs for `blk_mem_gen_1`, `ip_pll`, and `mig_7series_0` under `project-template-xilinx.ip_user_files
